name: Country Goodness Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 Chicken breasts, skinned and boned, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour in a shallow dish.
2. Sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper; add to the flour a few strips at a time, dredging each strip to coat on all sides.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1/4 cup of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken, turning to brown on all sides. Cook for about 10 minutes, adding oil as needed.
5. Pour off the excess oil and add the broth and hot water to the skillet.
6. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Stir in the wine and marjoram (or thyme); cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender and no pink remains.
8. Serve over biscuits or rice with sauce from the pan.
